programme.desc: Part of a gorgeous collection of mysteries, each one set in a different, picturesque region of France. A married police couple and child psychiatrist work together to uncover the mystery of a charred body. French with English subtitles.

programme.desc: Une jeune femme fréquente des hommes violents, pour finalement être tuée par sa meilleure amie. Un millionnaire est assassiné pour un trésor enfoui. Des destins plus étranges que la fiction.

programme.title: The New Detectives

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Les décès accidentels, les suicides, les disparitions et les incendies font partie du quotidien d'un enquêteur en assurance.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: La nature peut offrir des indices pour résoudre les crimes atroces. La germination des graines et la présence de certains insectes fournissent des informations essentielles sur les meurtres.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Parfois, les liens familiaux mènent au bain de sang. Lorsque l'argent est le mobile, le meurtre peut ébranler les fondations mêmes de la famille et du mariage.

programme.title: Totally Frank
programme.desc: Tasha est coincée dans un contrat d'enregistrement à toute épreuve, mais les filles pensent lui avoir trouvé une clause pour s'échapper.

programme.title: Totally Frank
programme.desc: Flo découvre que son ex, Jason, va se marier.

programme.title: Totally Frank
programme.desc: Neve a une rencontre inattendue avec son père, un sans abri alcoolique, et Flo saute sur l'opportunité pour essayer de les réunir.

programme.title: Handcrafted America
programme.desc: Handcrafted America - Dad's Favorites: Host Jill Wagner travels the country to find artisans who make handcrafted products that appeal to men. For the hunting and fishing type, Jill showcases the work of a husband and wife team that forges knives in remote Alaska, an Oregon craftsman who makes traditional bamboo fly fishing rods, and a North Carolina gunsmith who makes authentic flintlock long rifles. For sports fans, Jill heads to New Jersey to visit a leatherworker who makes vintage baseballs and footballs from exotic leathers. And for men who enjoy one-of-a-kind items, Jill highlights artisans who make pens from scraps of wood and furniture from discarded whiskey barrels.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: Wild West Chronicles - The Gold Rush Lawman: When failed prospector John Hicks Adams is elected sheriff of Santa Clara County, he must prove that he won't be a bust as a lawman too. Just weeks into the job, his courage is tested when a band of stagecoach robbers begins terrorizing the area.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: Wild West Chronicles - Pinkerton Detectives Track a Killer: After a bank robbery, two Pinkerton detectives join forces to track the notorious Missouri Kid. During a shootout, the Missouri Kid kills seasoned detective Charles Schumacher, leaving young George Dougherty to finish the job and avenge his death.

programme.title: Into The Wild Frontier
programme.desc: Into The Wild Frontier - Andrew Henry: Man of His Word: Though Andrew Henry has little experience when he partners in a trapping expedition, he pledges his word to complete the risky venture. As Blackfeet warriors close in, he must weigh his personal integrity against the lives of the men he leads.

programme.title: War of the Wildcats
programme.desc: During the early days of the Oklahoma oil boom, a greedy, self-assured oilman and a quiet, yet determined cowboy fight for the rights to oil on Indian land. All the while a pretty schoolteacher steals both men's hearts.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: The Cowboy Way - A New Chapter: These guys can wrangle any bull, but can they tame a wild bulldozer? In this episode of The Cowboy Way, the guys decide to build a new barn for a local rancher but it's man versus machine when Bubba's dozer breaks a pipeline, releasing a torrent of water. Jaclyn admits to her boss she's been looking for a job closer to home, then worries it might get her fired altogether. Will her family have to survive on one income? Cody decides to write a book about the cowboy way of life, but he may have bitten off more than he can chew. The cowboys struggle to get the barn raised in time to process the first shipment of the herd and might have to call in some favors to do it.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: The Cowboy Way - Keep on Chuckin': It's The Cowboy Way's first road trip ever! Bubba, Cody and Booger cut loose and head north to enter a big chuck wagon race. But they quickly discover this race is not for amateurs. Loose wagon wheels, knee-deep mud and professional-grade competition raise both the stakes, and their concerns. Will the guys risk life and limb to race and win? And while the cowboys are away, a surprise shipment of cattle comes in days early and their wives must jump into action. But this drop off is anything but routine when Kaley and Misty discover one heifer has an infection that could threaten the entire herd.

programme.title: Chasin' The Sun
programme.desc: Learn what you need to ask yourself before buying a watercraft. Offshore to the flats, Capt. Justin's lifetime of buying, selling and rigging boats will help you find what best fits your needs on the water.

programme.title: Chasin' The Sun
programme.desc: Capt Justin Leake goes back to his roots as a mate on a sportfisher and heads offshore with a group of old and new friends. They fight yellowfin tuna, marlin and monster mahi-mahi in perfect December weather on the gulf.

programme.title: Chasin' The Sun
programme.desc: Constructing and launching an offshore reef takes a skilled team of pros, time, money and a little help from Mother Nature to pull off. We follow along with a University of Florida team as they repurpose enormous cable reels into reefs that will attract a variety of tasty fish for decades to come.

programme.title: The Journey WIthin
programme.sub-title: The Journey Within - "Roaring Stag at 12 Yards
programme.desc: Join Mark Peterson as he ventures into Croatia's wild heart, hot on the trail of a legendary stag. In the midst of the rutting season's deafening roars, tensions escalate as Mark closes the distance. Equipped with his Gunwerks 7LRM, things get dicey as Mark is face to face with a roaring stag at 12 yards!

programme.title: The Journey WIthin
programme.sub-title: The Journey Within - "Hunting Marble Island for Axis and Rusa Deer
programme.desc: Hunting off the northeastern coast of Australia on Marble island could be one of the most beautiful sceneries in the world. Mark Peterson takes the 38 hour trip to Australia only to arrive in camp and have enough time to change and hit the ocean coastline looking for Axis & Javan Rusa deer.

programme.title: The Journey WIthin
programme.sub-title: The Journey Within - "Hunting In Croatia - Dugi Otok Island
programme.desc: Mark continues his quest in Croatia, and on the third day, they decide to venture to the coast where he will pursue his hunt on one of the numerous islands that permit hunting (Dugi Otok Island). Armed with his trusted Gunwerks 7LRM Rifle, Mark prepares to stalk the diverse array of exotic animals inhabiting these islands, offering him a rich selection of prey to choose from.

programme.title: The Journey WIthin
programme.sub-title: The Journey Within - "Hunting Mouflon and Hybrid Kri Kri Ibex- Dugi Otok Island In Croatia
programme.desc: Mark Peterson is in for an adrenaline-packed adventure in Croatia as he targets the elusive Kri Kri Ibex and Mouflon. With expert guides and unwavering determination, Mark navigates rugged terrain and thrilling hunts, showcasing the excitement and skill of the hunting industry. As his time in Croatia winds down, the episode captures the essence of ethical practices and the intense pursuit that defines this exhilarating sport. Don't miss the epic conclusion to Mark's expedition, where passion, skill, and the thrill of the hunt converge in unforgettable moments.

programme.title: The Journey WIthin
programme.sub-title: The Journey Within - "Chasing Giant Aoudad In California
programme.desc: Mark Peterson continues his quest on the Hearst Ranch in California. Next up on the list, California Aoudad. These Aoudad were introduced to the ranch in the early 1920s and have thrived ever since.

programme.title: The Journey WIthin
programme.sub-title: The Journey Within - "Luck of the Draw - Nevada Elk Hunt
programme.desc: Mark Peterson's next adventure takes him west to Nevada for a giant bull elk with an early rifle elk tag in his pocket. As a non-resident, Mark had less than a 1% chance to draw this tag with Worldwide Trophy Adventures (WTA) TAGS Program. This is why he loves the tag system, you never know when you're going to get a tag. This area provides one of the best elk tags in the state of Nevada. Mark is bringing his brand new Gunwerks Nexus 300 PRC rifle to the high mountains of the Nevada desert.

programme.title: The Journey WIthin
programme.sub-title: The Journey Within - "Spot and Stalk White - Lipped Peccary
programme.desc: Mark Peterson is south of the border in Veracruz, Mexico going after a Mexican Gulf Coast Whitetail. When the whitetail action slowed down, Mark tried his luck at a spot-and stalk hunt for White-lipped Peccary. With hot temps, Mark and company try to find water that the Peccary will be targeting to stay hydrated.

programme.title: Hunting Land Man
programme.sub-title: Hunting Land Man - "Natchez Big Bucks & Big Closings
programme.desc: In this episode, Slade takes you on a ride through one of the coolest cities in the south, the historic Natchez, Mississippi. This is an area in which Slade sells a lot of hunting land and being only 40 minutes from where he grew up, Slade is very familiar with all there is to do in the area not only from a recreational standpoint but also for entertainment. Slade takes you through the showing process on a beautiful piece of property and bring it full circle at the closing. You'll also watch a deer hunt with Slade in Natchez that was featured on Realtree Monster Bucks DVD. This is a jampacked episode with so much to learn and also enjoy. We know you'll love it.

programme.title: Hunting Land Man
programme.sub-title: Hunting Land Man - "The Bull Named Bobby Wheat
programme.desc: In this episode, Slade and part of the old Trained Assassins Crew, Luke Mitchell (producer) and Ryan Wascom (host), head out to Colorado to chase bugling elk with their bows. Also joining the crew is one of Slade's real estate clients and his son. Part of the deal when this client worked with Slade was that Slade lined them up an elk hunt the following fall. It is an amazing week at camp with five arrows being sent down range and multiple elk hitting the dirt. You do not want to miss this one.

programme.title: Hunting Land Man
programme.sub-title: Hunting Land Man - "The Missouri Project Part 2
programme.desc: In this episode, we are back in Missouri on our new farm that we've recently purchased. We developed our last farm, and did a 1031 tax free exchange to buy this farm so we can develop and sell it later on. This is the first time we've seen the property, so we are finding out what we are going to do with it and how we are going to lay it out. Once we get that figured out, we go into the dirty work of planting, moving box stands, and making sure everything is good for hunting season. Fast forward and we have two amazing hunts where both Ryan and myself take awesome bucks with our bows. This one has it all! Do not miss it!

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter | American Classics in Detroit and Big-block Camaros in Arizona
programme.desc: Tom Cotter discovers some amazing barn finds in Detroit, MI, including a Buick Caballero, a pair of Pontiac GTOs and a pair of Jaguar XK140s. Next, we find Tom in Arizona where he uncovers some interesting Mopars and two Big-block Chevy Camaros.

programme.title: Chip Foose Draws a Car

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter | Impala, Eagle, Galaxie, Pinto and MORE!
programme.desc: Tom Cotter checks out a 1964 Impala SS, a lifted AMC Eagle 4x4, a 1963 Ford Galaxie 500 Convertible, and some Ford Pinto race cars with SCCA and IMSA race history.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter | Classic Fords, Chevys and some dusty Italian sports cars!
programme.desc: Tom Cotter finds himself in Michigan again where he comes upon a pole barn full of Chevys and Fords that owner Denny has all sorts of stories about. Tom then heads to the other end of the state for some European sports car barn finds.

programme.title: The Driver's Seat with Henry Catchpole | Mazda MX-5 and Alpine A110 R Reviews
programme.desc: In this episode of The Driver's Seat, automotive journalist Henry Catchpole reviews the latest Mazda MX-5 and the new Alpine A110 R.

programme.title: The Appraiser | Custom 1970 Ford F100, 1988 Lamborghini LM002, 1971 Ford Bronco
programme.desc: In this episode, Colin Comer appraises a freshly built barn find 1970 Ford F100 pickup truck, an original-owner 1988 Lamborghini LM002 aka the “Rambo Lambo," and a 1971 Ford Bronco that has been used in some interesting off-road situations.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter | Massive stash of cars in old car dealership
programme.desc: Tom Cotter gets a tour of an enormous "museum" of forgotten cars stashed in a defunct car dealership. Tom's next stop reveals a rare Corvair, a large collection of Mazdas, and a rare "Alfa Jr."

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter | RARE Ford Country Squire Wagon & Rust-free finds in Arizona
programme.desc: Tom Cotter finds a factory "hot rod" 1 of 1 Ford Country Squire Wagon in suburban Detroit. Next, we find Tom near Lake Havasu in Arizona where the dry weather has been kind to cars left outside for decades.

programme.title: Capturing Car Culture w/ Larry Chen | Hong Kong's Underground Car Scene, and Nissan Hyper Force
programme.desc: Larry Chen checks out Hong Kong's underground car scene. Next, Larry gets the inside scoop on the newly revealed Nissan Hyper Force concept electric hyper-car.

programme.title: MODIFIED
programme.sub-title: The Legendary RUF CTR Yellowbird and a 911-beating Cayman
programme.desc: Bruce Meyer lent Matt Farah this first-built RUF CTR Yellowbird, a car built by one of the most legendary European tuners. Next, Matt jumps in a heavily modified Porsche Cayman and discovers the potential it has for being BETTER than a 911.

programme.title: Ultimate Drag Race Replay | Corvettes vs. The World
programme.desc: We drag race the first-ever hybrid, all-wheel-drive Corvette E-Ray against two Italian Supercars: the Ferrari F8 and Lamborghini Huracan Evo RWD. After that, it's the 2023 C8 Corvette Z06 against a Porsche 992 GT3, a Ducati V4 SP2, and an Audi R8.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter | Oldsmobiles, Mopars, Pontiacs and Fords!
programme.desc: Tom Cotter finds Oldsmobile barn find heaven (with some Mopars and Pontiacs sprinkled in for good measure). After that, Tom stumbles upon a 1970 Shelby Mustang GT500 buried in a garage, but in amazing condition.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Meet fascinating creatures from across the globe and learn to run, hop, and crawl like your favorite animal friends. Dance and sing along to discover animal names and the native habitats of the world's most unique creatures. See real-life images of lions and zebras on the African savannah, then learn animal names through repetition and narration, or simply watch your favorite animals play!

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Take your little explorer on an exotic musical expedition to meet wild animals from across the globe. Journey to the jungle, savannah, desert and forest.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Share a rainbow of sights and sounds with your baby as you discover the wonders of color together! Join puppet host "Vincent Van Goat" as he creates six Van Gogh masterpieces exploring red, green, blue, yellow, orange, and purple. World Of Colors is a spirited celebration of creative expression.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby MacDonald: A Day On the Farm
programme.desc: As little ones' curiosity about the world blossoms, you can help sow the seeds of discovery with Baby MacDonald: A Day on the Farm. Featuring live-action images, nursery rhymes and fun-filled puppet shows, this playful, interactive program introduces little ones to the exciting sights and sounds of a real working farm.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Within a baby's first year of life, new experiences can transform what might otherwise seem to be ordinary events into exciting opportunities for imaginative play. Baby Neptune exposes little ones to the wonders of water in their world -- whether they're stomping in the rain, splashing in the bathtub, playing "catch me if you can" with the tide on the beach, or "meeting" the fascinating creatures that live in rivers, lakes and oceans.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby Da Vinci: From Head to Toe
programme.desc: From the day their eyes open, babies begin to observe new things around the world and about themselves. Baby Da Vinci From Head to Toe presents them with a playful and interactive introduction to the human body in three languages -- English, Spanish, and French. With a whimsical blend of adorable puppets, real children and animals and famous works of art, this captivating program also features upbeat classical music.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Your little one will want to keep a beat, snap his fingers and march his feet! Join new characters Pillie, the musical woodpecker, and Coco, the dancing cockatoo, and share the excitement of rhythm with your baby. World of Rhythm explores rhythm in music, rhythm in nature and rhythm as a form of expression.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: As each day passes, babies' awareness of the world around them -- and all the wonders it holds -- continues to develop. Wild animals are especially intriguing and World Animals captures the spirtit of little ones' fascination with wild creatures as it introduces them to animals living in the jungle, in the ocean, and on the savannah.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: As babies grow and change, so does the landscape around them. From fiery red leaves to falling snowflakes from flowers in bloom to fireworks in July, every season of the year has its own special magic just waiting to be discovered.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: With the Dolittle, and other Baby programs under their belts, the tots who follow Julie Aigner-Clark's Baby Einstein series will sidle up to Baby Newton expecting a similar exploration of building blocks to brilliance, but this time there's a wrinkle or two. Animation makes its first appearance, and parents steeped in keep-it-simple culture may object to the springy "I Know My Shapes" song, a departure from classical-only video predecessors.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby's First Moves: Get Up and Go
programme.desc: Within the first year of babies' lives, their physical development begins to kick into high gear as they explore ways to physically interact with the world around them. BABY'S FIRST MOVES is a joyful celebration of their movement milestones -- including first steps, clapping, jumping, dancing and more.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Baby Mozart is an introduction to Mozart's beautiful music, which has been proven to have positive affects on people of all ages, especially babies. Images of brightly colored toys and known objects aid in the audio presentation of child-friendly arrangements and sound effects.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob wants to impress everybody at the town dance. Molly suggests holding a fashion show.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Raspberry is discovered by a talent scout who wants her to move to Berry Big City and design a new line of Glitter fashions! She will be provided with her own studio, staff, publicity, commitments from big department stores-everything she needs to be a big fashion designing star! All her friends are thrilled for her. Only Cherry is a bit less enthusiastic about Raspberry's stardom, which Raspberry mistakenly interprets as jealousy.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: With the summer almost over, Blueberry overhears Strawberry talking about a wonderful tropical island and believes her friend is going to surprise them all with a much needed vacation! Blueberry makes the other girls promise to keep the secret until Strawberry reveals the big surprise. Of course, even though they've promised to keep the secret, they can't help but try and suss out what the island's like from every little thing Strawberry does.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's the last week of summer and Berry Bitty City is hopping with activity as the girls prepare for their tropical island vacation at Berry Breezy Bay Resort. But just as they're about to leave, bad news: the resort is closed for the season due to berry breezy weather. The girls are disappointed, but Orange isn't giving up. She says if they can't go to the tropical island, maybe they can bring the tropical island here!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: With only a few days of summer left, the girls are about to enjoy their first vacation in their newly-created, tropical beach resort at Berry Bitty Lake, when who should descend upon them but Mavis Maraschino, the comically over-the-top "Entertainment Tonight"-style show host. Mavis has dumped her focus on fashions in favor of an even glitzier show called Lifestyles of the Berry Big Bitty Stars, and she wants her first segment to be about how pop superstar Cherry Jam spends her vacation.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: On a beautiful winter's night, Blueberry reads the Baby Berrykins a story of what happened one winter in Berry Bitty City-a winter that almost wasn't. Just as everyone is ready for winter fun and fashions, a sudden warming melts the snow and ruins their plans. Improvising with snowmen made of shaved ice and cotton puffs, Strawberry and her friends play "Capture the Snowman's Carrot Nose." The Berrykins want to join in the fun, so the girls play against them, with Strawberry refereeing.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's another windy winter day, and the postal bees are staying indoors-the wind is too strong for their berry bitty wings. "We don't know when the next mail will get through!" It's bad news for Blueberry, who has been anxiously awaiting the next installment of a Patty Persimmon Detective story. If only she could get to the post office in Berry Bitty Dale where her package is waiting!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry, Cherry and the girls form a new band, Strawberry and the Sweet Beats, and prepare to go on the road to perform at the Opening Ceremony of the Berry Big City Games! While master mechanic Berrykin Bruce turns Cherry's tour bus into the band's hotel-on-wheels, Strawberry and her friends pack for the big trip. But the rest of Berry Bitty City points out that someone needs to run the girls' businesses while they are gone.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Berrykins Ed and Earl report to Princess Berrykin and Strawberry that they are certain there is a monster in the berry patch! They saw something with many noses and many tails making weird noises in the bushes. But upon further investigation by Strawberry and her friends, it is discovered that friendly boy Huckleberry Pie was driving his pet-mobile of orphan dogs through the countryside, took a wrong turn and got stuck near Berry Bitty City.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Blueberry is disappointed in the girls' lack of enthusiasm for the Patti Persimmon mystery novels, her favorite book series. She finds herself missing the company of her fellow Persimmon fan Huckleberry, and thinks up a great way to get him to visit. She invites Huck to co-write a story with her to submit to an online mystery magazine.. Huck eagerly accepts and comes for a visit.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.sub-title: The Mystery of the Disappearing Dog Show
programme.desc: When Huckleberry and Blueberry's Patti Persimmon-style mystery story is rejected by an online mystery magazine, Blueberry and Huck have to come up with a new way to raise support for Huckleberry's Hotel for Homeless Pets back in Berry Big City. Strawberry suggests they hold a big dog show! Plum makes over-ambitious plans to display talents that her dog does not quite have, trying to teach him complicated dance routines.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry and the girls excitedly plan to put on a "Story Time On Stage" musical play for the Berrykin kids: "Berryella and Prince Berry Charming," directed and choreographed by Plum, with musical direction by Cherry. Strawberry will play Berryella, with Lemon and Blueberry as her comically jealous stepsisters, and costume designer Raspberry as her Fairy Fashionmother.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.sub-title: When the Berry Fairy Came to Stay
programme.desc: Out gathering berries one day, Strawberry & her pets find a tiny fairy among the berry vines. Realizing that Strawberry is a very kind & caring person, the little fairy decides to take advantage of the kid's good nature.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: One windy day, a tiny fairy named Sherry Bobbleberry gets blown into Strawberry's open window. She is a klutzy little thing who is convinced she will always be a major goof-up.

programme.title: LEGO Marvel Super Heroes: Maximum Overload
programme.desc: Spider-Man and Marvel's Super Heroes take on a mischievous Loki and a team of super villains in an all-new LEGO adventure

programme.title: Back To School
programme.desc: When the NEXO-Knights are sloppy in a fight with Jestro, Merlok 2.0 sends them back to the Knights' Academy. Not only for a brush-up but to find out what Jestro is after in its hallowed halls. As they Knights battle Jestro – in a somewhat haphazard and lazy way – they discuss the fact that Jestro never wins and that they're always getting over on him. Despite defeating the jerky Jester and his evil Book, Merlok 2.0 discovers that something about the attack on the village is tied to the Knights' Academy. It looks like that's where they'll strike next. It wouldn't hurt for the Knights to go “back to school” to watch for Jestro and for some refresher training. Merlok is sure Jestro wants something at the Academy, but he doesn't know what it is. The Knights are very much “fish out of water” at the academy, even with the “cool kids” – Robin and Ava – showing them around. The next generation of Knights is being taught to integrate the NEXO-Magic of Merlok into their fighting techniques and these kids are good (so good, they initially kick the lazy, know-it-all Knight's butts!) Their old principal, the ever-ornery Headmaster Brickland, sets them straight: they're all still slackers, and they better get their acts together (especially Lance!) The Knights take shifts as “library helpers” much to the delight of the old squirebot librarian, MARGE. They're convinced Jestro is after a book…isn't he always after a book? When Jestro attacks, the Knights help organize the students and there's a big fight in the Academy Library versus Jestro and his Monsters. They drive Jestro off without letting him steal any books! Victory! But as Jestro leaves, we see him holding what the Book of Monsters really wanted: a snow globe with a castle in it that was sitting on the librarian's desk. In the Lava Lands, Jestro throws the snow globe into a volcano and it frees the massive Castle of Monstrux from its snowy magic prison

programme.title: Blippi's Holiday Special 2022
programme.desc: Blippi and Meekah follow a holiday treasure map and do some fun winter activities.

programme.title: The Berry Best Treasure
programme.desc: Cherry Jam is being driven to distraction! She can't finish a song that she promised to write for a singing group, thanks to the earsplitting noise from Berrykin construction crews who are trying to find the sparkleberry juice blockage that has shut down the town's power. Strawberry can't cook in the café, Lemon's hair salon appliances are running out of control—life in Berry Bitty City is impossible! Strawberry rallies their spirits by suggesting a fun way for them to spend the day out of town: a treasure hunt! She describes a game where the girls divide into two teams, and each team creates fun written clues for the other that lead to funny objects the girls must collect.

programme.title: The Berry Scary Fun Adventure
programme.desc: With the power completely out in Berry Bitty City, the girls go on a camping trip to be out of the way of the Berrykin work crews. Lemon is nervous because she believes there is a creepy creature in the forest (that she read about in a book Blueberry loaned her), and the girls get the nervous bug, but Strawberry turns their apprehension into fun by daring her friends to stay out in the woods the longest! Rallied by a sense of competition and adventure, the girls divide into three groups and set up tents—each convinced they will be the bravest group. They each come up with diverting activities to distract themselves.

programme.title: Foods that Ooze
programme.desc: To win gold at the Ooze-lympics, Avery goes to Chef Dufflet Rosenberg's kitchen to make Molten Chocolate Lava Cake. Lily gets fresh honey at a bee farm. For the final event, Matt challenges them to make extra-oozy, stuffed pizzas.

programme.title: Foods that are Hot
programme.desc: Lily drops in on Chef Lily Pottinger to make a classic spicy Jamaican dish, Jerk Chicken. Avery tests his tolerance for hot peppers at a hot sauce store. Then it's back to the kitchen to see whose fiery wings will bring Matt to tears.

programme.title: Fallen Angel
programme.desc: Blue Angel slowly begins whittling away Playmaker's Life Points using her Trickstar deck. Yusaku manages to fight back and Aoi is forced to use the mysterious card that the Knights of Hanoi gave her.

programme.title: A Storm is Coming
programme.desc: Aoi is left in a coma after he duel with Yusaku. A grieving Akira lures Playmaker into a trap to get the program to heal her. That's when Revolver, Hanoi's leader appears, and challenges Yusaku to a duel with Aoi's fate on the line.

programme.title: Blippi Visits an Orange Farm
programme.desc: Join Blippi as he visits Showcase of Citrus Orange Farm in Clermont, Florida.

programme.title: The Berry Lucky Day
programme.desc: The girls are driven to distraction by their frisky puppies frolicking all over Berry Bitty City! Full of energy and thinking that everything in town is a toy for them to play with, they cause comical mayhem wherever they go. Strawberry suggests the pups need a place of their own where they can play—a dog park! The girls decide to call in Huckleberry, who runs an animal hotel in Berry Big City, to help design the park. With Huck on his way, Cherry practices her singing. She believes her ability to hit a perfect high note is the result of a good luck charm—a beautiful crystal — that she keeps in her pocket. Although Strawberry says singing isn't about luck, but about practice and hard work, Cherry isn't convinced.

programme.title: HappyKids
programme.desc: HappyKids

programme.title: HappyKids
programme.desc: HappyKids

programme.title: The Littlest Berrykin
programme.desc: Blueberry and Huck turn the Baby Berrykins' favorite fairy tale, “The Littlest Berrykin,” into a comedy play. They pitch it to director Plum and the assembled cast and crew using a large storybook. As Huck and Blueberry narrate the story, we push in on the book and its illustrations transition into animation. In the story, the King and Queen of the Berry Patch (played by Huck and Blueberry) are retiring to the tropics. But before leaving, they must choose which of their three princesses (played by Lemon, Raspberry and Strawberry in royal gowns) will rule the kingdom.

programme.title: The Berry Big Relay Race
programme.desc: Orange wants to spend the day teaching her puppy to fetch, but the frisky little gal doesn't seem to understand the “retrieve” part of the activity—as soon as she gets the ball, she runs out of sight and returns moments later without it. Orange gets a new ball and tries again, with the same results. Over and over, until Orange is out of balls. Puzzled and frustrated that she can't find where her pup has stashed them, she goes to enlist her friends to help her search. Orange finds Strawberry, Plum and Raspberry in Lemon's salon, getting their hair and nails done, but something starts going terribly wrong with the appliances.

programme.title: Foods that Crack
programme.desc: When her store-bought taco shells crack into a gazillion pieces, Lily cooks up a batch of home made taco shells that crunch without cracking. Meanwhile, Avery investigates how chickens lay eggs without cracking them, and makes a trip to see some of the biggest eggs of all – at an ostrich farm! Then our hosts take a crack at cooking each other's favourite omelet, and the results have Matt cracking up!

programme.title: Foods that Flow
programme.desc: Looking for ways to have a meal in a cup, Avery visits the Gimme A Squeeze Juice Bar to make fruit smoothies. Lily tries her hand at goat milking at a goat dairy farm. Back in the kitchen, Matt demonstrates how to taste two delicious soups in the same bowl.

programme.title: Doggyland
programme.desc: Join Bow Wizzle (played by Snoop Dogg) and the whole Doggyland crew as they sing, dance and rap while celebrating their parents and teaching us why we should appreciate and listen to them! / Join Bow Wizzle as he teaches the Doggyland crew all about the joys of reading! In this video the puppies will dance, sing and rap about their love of books and how they can transport you anywhere in the world if you use your imagination! / Learn to count from one (uno) to ten (diez) in Spanish with the help of Bow Wizzle and the puppies. Sing along with this kids song designed to teach chidren the numbers one, two, three, four, five, six, seven, eight, nine and ten in Spanish! / Sing along with all the puppies with this new kids music video from Doggyland. In this video, Woofee gets all the citizens of Doggyland together to sing, dance and rap about why it's so important that we respect and be kind to each other! / In this video, London Lilly (played Leona Lewis), Woofee and Yap Yap learn how to overcome their fear of the dark with help from Bow Wizzle (played by Snoop Dogg).

programme.title: Doggyland
programme.desc: It's important to remember that there is no reason to be afraid of the dark, which is why we're bringing you this brand new sing along. Woofee, Barks and Yap Yap sing and dance while they help each face their fears and turn off their night lights! / What is your dream? To be a doctor? A rockstar? Yap Yap and Billy are going to explore their dreams in this new sing along kids video from Doggyland. The duo lead Bow Wizzle (played by Snoop Dogg) and the other puppies in an adventure in the clouds where they sing and dance about following their dreams! / Time to get healthy and eat vegetables with Doggyland! In this video, one of the puppies learns to eat and enjoy eating veggies with the help of the rest of the Doggyland crew as they sing and dance together to celebrate how great vegetables are! / Chow Wow is inviting you to her tea party! Join Bow Wizzle and the rest of the Doggyland crew as they learn how to properly drink tea, eat snacks, dance and sing!

Max Dolcelli
programme.desc: New York comedian Max Dolcelli uses his cynacism and enigmatic stage presence to riff on Waze, Dollar Store pregnancy tests, and how horrible toys were when he was a kid.

programme.title: Tommy Ryman
programme.desc: Tommy Ryman grew up with a new-age, folk singing mother and a traditional, Lutheran insurance-agent father. This XY equation evidently equals: acclaimed comedian. Ryman has earned the title of Semifinalist on NBC's Last Comic Standing. Roseanne Barr, a professed fan, raves she has “never seen anything like Tommy before in her whole life, he is one-of-a-kind, fantastic!” Ryman also recently won the title of Best of the Midwest at the prestigious Gilda's Laugh Fest. Ryman's act can be described as absurdist and clever, masked behind a very likable and innocent demeanor, often thought of as awkwardly charming. He is a favorite among audiences at top clubs, corporates, and colleges around the nation.

programme.title: Daniel Eachus
programme.desc: Daniel Eachus talks about weird jobs, strange fears, and how to prank restaurants all through the lens of being the lifelong skinny guy.

programme.title: Danny Johnson
programme.desc: Danny Johnson's hilarious, clean stand-up has entertained audiences in comedy clubs, corporate events, and churches nationwide. Often called a cross between Jerry Seinfeld and Kevin James Danny's show is relatable, engaging, and always hilarious. Danny has starred in numerous TV commercials, Comedy Central's Laugh Riots, Florida's Funniest Comedian semi-finalist, Winner-Carnival Cruise line Comedy Challenge, Finalist in Search for the One Christian Comedy contest, and has had the pleasure of sharing the stage with Chris Rock, Bob Saget, Billy Gardell, Richard Lewis, and a variety of others. Danny has led a dual track career for over a decade achieving success in both corporate America and as a comedian. Blending his unique skill sets led to him publishing his first book, "You Stink and They Know It! A practical guide to nailing your next job interview."

programme.title: Cam Bertrand
programme.desc: Cam shares his outlook on relationships and life through the eyes of a 23-year-old in a way that everyone can relate to. Bringing high energy and witty style that appeals to a wide demographic.

programme.title: Joe Zimmerman
programme.desc: Joe Zimmerman grew up in Morgantown, West Virginia, and started his comedy career in North Carolina. While living in the South, his stand-up group the Beards of Comedy landed a record deal with Comedy Central Records.

programme.title: Josh Sneed
programme.desc: Hailing from the great city of Cincinnati, Ohio, Josh comes to Dry Bar to bring “new life” to his comedy. Being funny 24/7 can be difficult, but Josh Sneed does it. Watch “Live in the Dessert” by Josh Sneed now!

programme.title: Python Island
programme.desc: A group discovers a magical tree guarded by a giant snake and other fantastical creatures. Dubbed in English.

programme.title: The Patriot
programme.desc: A deadly virus threatens to wipe out an entire Rocky Mountain town, forcing the town doctor (Steven Seagal) to escape the soldiers who enforce the town's quarantine and devise a cure.

programme.title: A Soldier's Revenge
programme.desc: Haunted by wartime horrors, Civil War soldier-turned-bounty hunter Frank Connor spends his postwar time polishing off two things: whiskey and fugitives.

programme.title: Coup de foudre sucré salé
programme.desc: Une critique de restaurant doit se faire passer pour la cuisinière du chef qu'elle a insulté pour faire amende honorable.

programme.title: Deux chefs et un gâteau de mariage
programme.desc: Une critique gastronomique au sommet de son art doit faire la paix avec un chef allergique aux critiques avant le mariage de sa soeur.

programme.title: La course au mariage
programme.desc: Un couple qui n'arrive pas à se décider sur le thème de son mariage engage deux organisateurs, Taylor et Ben, qui se disputent le poste.

programme.title: Belle comme l'amour
programme.desc: Emma, la créatrice d'un site web, voit ses chiffres de fréquentation baisser. Elle fait appel à Jill, experte dans le domaine, pour l'aider.

programme.title: Admissions Granted
programme.desc: In a landmark Supreme Court case pitting Asian American plaintiffs against Harvard University, activists on both sides wrestle with hard truths about race and equality, as the fate of affirmative action hangs in the balance.

programme.title: Battleground Georgia
programme.desc: Passionate voter engagement, followed by the fury of those who spread and believed "the big lie" were dominant narratives of the U.S. elections of 2020. Ahead of the 2024 election cycle, in this installment of the Turning Point series, Battleground Georgia becomes the lens through which to view the history of racist voter suppression, the power of grass roots organizing and the tension between old institutions and new ways of thinking about what a vibrant democracy could be.

programme.title: Serving In Secret: Love, Country, and Don't Ask, Don't Tell
programme.desc: In 1970, Tom Carpenter graduated from the Naval Academy ready to follow his family's lineage in the military as a US Marine Corps attack pilot. Then he met Courtland Hirschi. Tom and Court fell deeply in love, keeping their illicit relationship a secret. At that time, homosexuality – if discovered – resulted in being kicked out of the military with a dishonorable discharge, a court martial, jail time, or worse… Tom and Court's story would be no exception. ‘Serving in Secret' features leading voices in politics, historians, civil rights activists, and retired military personnel telling the story of LGBTQ discrimination in the military, and the controversial compromise known as “Don't Ask, Don't Tell.” Tom's work towards its repeal along with many others was the Turning Point for LGBTQ+ rights, a fight that continues today.

programme.title: Jumpshot: The Kenny Sailors Story
programme.desc: From EP Stephen Curry, the award-winning film Jump shot celebrates the true story of Kenny Sailors, the forgotten basketball legend who introduced the jump shot, became a 2-time collegiate All American and NBA pioneer, revolutionized the sport for women, served as a US Marine in WWII, and then quietly faded into history. Featuring interviews with Kevin Durant, Dirk Nowitzki, and Bobby Knight. Directed by Jacob Hamilton.

programme.title: John McEnroe: In the Realm of Perfection
programme.desc: Though John McEnroe was the No. 1 tennis player of his day, he never won the French Open. Director Julien Faraut uses the toughest of those losses -- to Ivan Lendl in 1984 -- to anchor this cinematic study of McEnroe's wily game and notorious anger. Directed by Julien Faraut.

programme.title: Travis Kelce: Sharp, Sturdy, Swift
programme.desc: Blessed with God-given talent, genes and mentality, Travis Kelce forged his name in the annals of American sporting achievements. As his life takes on another twist in the form of T. Swift, we take a look back at the journey of one of NFL's greats. Directed by Nick Randall.

programme.title: Art Blakey
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Mike Stern
programme.sub-title: Mike Stern & Didier Lockwood: Jazz à Vienne
programme.desc: Guitarist Mike Stern and violin player Didier Lockwood sharing a stage: that promises a good show! After playing for years with Blood, Sweat & Tears, Mike Stern landed a gig with drummer Billy Cobham and then broke through with Miles Davis' comeback band in the 1980s. Didier Lockwood played in jazz fusion band Magma during the 1970s and is known for his use of electric amplification and experimentation. Together they perform a unique duo concert at the beautiful antique theatre in Vienne, France.

programme.title: Trombone Shorty
programme.sub-title: Troy 'Trombone Shorty' Andrews: Jazz à Vienne
programme.desc: Jazz phenomenon Trombone Shorty dishes out a mix of funk, jazz, hip-hop and soul at this concert at the French festival Jazz à Vienne. Playing with the energy of a rock star, Troy Andrews, a.k.a. ‘Trombone Shorty', pays homage to jazz legends. With his hypnotic performance and boundless energy, Trombone Shorty puts up an unparalleled performance.

programme.title: La Velle
programme.sub-title: Rhoda Scott & La Velle: Hammond, Soul and Blues
programme.desc: American soul and jazz organist Rhoda Scott spent most of her career in France, where she earned recognition far greater than that accorded to her in the United States. There was never any doubt about what instrument she would play as a child. "It's really the most beautiful instrument in the world,” she once stated in an interview. “The first thing I did was take my shoes off and work the pedals.” This performance at the French Festival Jazz à Vienne is extra special. Not only because of the beautiful location, but also because she shares the stage with American gospel and blues singer La Velle. Together they give an intimate and beautiful show in the antique theatre of Vienne.

programme.title: Anita Oday
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Gerry Mulligan, Dave Glenn, Harold Danko & Ed Neumeister
programme.sub-title: Gerry Mulligan Big Band - The North Sea Jazz
programme.desc: The North Sea Jazz Festival is the largest indoor music festival in the world, known globally as the event where the past, present and future of jazz are featured within three days. Next to a firm base of jazz as the festival's staple music genre, many others, such as blues, soul, funk, or hip hop, pass by. In 1982, American saxophonist Gerry Mulligan gave an unforgettable performance at the North Sea Jazz Festival in The Hague. Mulligan was one of the leading arrangers of the cool jazz era, who worked with Miles Davis, Stan Kenton and Claude Thornhill in the 1950s and 1960s. Mulligan's early pianoless 1950s quartet with trumpeter Chet Baker is still regarded as one of the finest groups in cool jazz. Born in New York in 1927, Mulligan spent his life composing, arranging and playing jazz until his death on January 20, 1996.

programme.title: Ted Curson
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Avishai Cohen
programme.desc: Double bassist Avishai Cohen's trio with Noam David (drums) and Omri Mor (pianist) joined forces with the international Symphony Orchestra ‘INSO-Lviv', conducted by Christian Schumann. On June 24, 2017 they brought Avishai Cohen's signature blend of influences from Eastern Europe, American jazz and the Middle East to the Alfa Jazz Festival in Lviv, Ukraine. Cohen, who also supplies vocalizations in the Judeo-Spanish dialect Ladino, came to prominence internationally in the 1990s when jazz great Chick Corea offered him a place in his trio and a recording deal. Thirty years later, Cohen has become a house-hold name himself, leaving his Ukrainian audience enthralled and connected through the universal language of music.

programme.title: B.B.King
programme.sub-title: B.B. King Orchestra - The North Sea Jazz
programme.desc: The North Sea Jazz Festival is the largest indoor music festival in the world, known globally as the event where the past, present and future of jazz are featured within three days. Next to a firm base of jazz as the festival's staple music genre, many others, such as blues, soul, funk, or hip hop, pass by. Back in 1979, legendary American blues guitarist B.B. King gave an unforgettable performance for the audience in The Hague. Born in 1925 in a small town in Mississippi, 'Lucille' (as he nicknamed his guitar) helped him escape a miserable existence picking cotton. He arrived in Memphis in the late 1940s, where his cousin Bukka White taught him the tricks of the blues. Soon he developed his own style. King's virtuoso, narrative solos with lots of vibrato, have been an inspiration for most (rock) guitarists after him.

programme.title: Milky Chance
programme.desc: The German duet is back and better than ever! Milky Chance is the success story of two school friends, Clemens Rehbein and Philipp Dausch. After a long break, 2017 marks the release of a second, long-waited, album "Blossom". And, for the public, finally the occasion to discover live these new compositions, mixing rock, folk and electro pop. With reggae vibrations that can rub shoulders with house elements, Milky Chance has one of the most singular sounds. With the presence of musicians on stage, and if we believe the listening of the new record, we can expect more electric concerts, more electronic and even more energetic than in the past!

programme.title: Martha Argerich, Lily Maisky, Iddo Bar-Shai & Tedi Papavrami
programme.sub-title: Martha Argerich – A Birthday Celebration III
programme.desc: On the occasion of her 80th birthday, Argentinian pianist Martha Argerich explored chamber music repertoire in this wonderful concert, recorded at Château de Chantilly, France. The ‘Grande Dame' of the piano is joined by various renowned artists, including pianists Lily Maisky and Iddo Bar-Shaï, violinists Tedi Papavrami and Akiko Suwanai, her daughter Lyda Chen-Argerich on viola, and cellist Mischa Maisky. On the program are Felix Mendelssohn's Piano Trio No. 1 in D minor, Op. 49 Leoš Janáček's Violin Sonata Franz Schubert's Rondo in A major, D. 951 and Johannes Brahms's Piano Quartet No. 3 in C minor, Op. 60. These performances were recorded on May 4 and June 13, 2021.

programme.title: Sir Simon Rattle
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Zhu Xiao-Mei
programme.desc: Chinese pianist Zhu Xiao-Mei performs J. S. Bach's Goldberg Variations (BWV 988) at the Leipzig Bach Festival. This June 2014 concert was recorded at St. Thomas Church, where Bach spent most time of his career as 'Thomaskantor', the musical director of the Thomanerchor church choir. The Goldberg Variations consist of one aria and a set of 30 variations. The work was first published in 1741 and was named after harpsichordist Johann Gottlieb Goldberg. In contrast to melodic variations on a theme, the Goldberg Variations do not follow the melody, but rather use the aria's bass line and chord progression. Every third variation in the series of 30 is a canon that follows an ascending pattern. The Goldberg Variations are among Bach's most celebrated works, which gained an even larger audience thanks to Glenn Gould's legendary recordings of the work in 1955 and 1981.

programme.title: Sergey Malov
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Glass Marcano, Orchestre Symphonique Région Centre-Val de Loire/Tours & Stéphanie-Marie Degand
programme.sub-title: Beethoven Violin Concerto & Bizet Symphony in C
programme.desc: Young Venezuelan conductor Glass Marcano is a rising star. Having played in various local youth and symphony orchestras as a violinist, her first experience conducting an ensemble followed in 2012. In September 2020, she won the Orchestra Prize at La Maestra Competition – the first orchestra direction contest for women – held in Paris. In this concert, recorded at Opéra de Tours in February 2021, Marcano leads the Orchestre Symphonique Région Centre-Val de Loire/Tours in performances of two Romantic masterpieces. The program opens with Ludwig van Beethoven's Violin Concerto in D major, Op. 61, featuring Stéphanie-Marie Degand as the soloist. This piece is one of the most important works in its genre. The program concludes with Georges Bizet's 1855 Symphony in C major, written when the composer was only 17 years old.

programme.title: Nikolay Lugansky
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: David Grimal & Les Dissonances
programme.sub-title: Beethoven - Symphony No. 4 in B-flat major, Op. 60
programme.desc: Les Dissonances is a collective of artists founded by violinist David Grimal in 2004. The conductorless ensemble consists of musicians from the most prestigious European orchestras, international soloists, and young talents. In this performance, Les Dissonances perform Ludwig van Beethoven's Symphony No. 4 in B-flat major, Op. 60. Count Franz von Oppersdorff, who adored Beethoven's Symphony No. 2, offered the composer a large sum to write a similar work. Completed in the autumn of 1806, the symphony's first performance was at a private concert in Vienna in March of 1807. Symphony No. 4 is often overshadowed by its revolutionary predecessor and successor. With its lightweight and cheerful nature, Symphony No. 4 contrasts with the two aforementioned works. This performance was recorded at Opéra de Dijon, France, in 2013.

programme.title: Kristof Barati
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: David Grimal & Les Dissonances
programme.desc: Les Dissonances is a collective of artists founded by violinist David Grimal in 2004. The conductorless ensemble consists of musicians from the most prestigious European orchestras, international soloists, and young talents. In this performance, Les Dissonances perform Johannes Brahms' String Sextet No. 1 in B-flat major, Op. 18. The work is scored for two violins, two violas, and two cellos. Brahms wrote his only two string sextets at the very beginning of his career. String Sextet No. 1 was written in 1860. Brahms was one of the first to compose for this ensemble, blazing a trail for Antonín Dvořák, Pyotr Ilyich Tchaikovsky, Arnold Schoenberg, and others. This performance was recorded at Opéra de Dijon, France, in 2013.

programme.title: Tactical Planning
programme.desc: Matt and Froy walk into a moral gray area when they repossess a vehicle by stealing it. Then, Sonia and Matt discover their target van is being used in an investigation of highly toxic material. And, Matt poses as a valet to retrieve a car from an irate diner and his befuddled date.

programme.title: Four Wheel Surprise
programme.desc: First, Lou and Matt confront a big-time player and his bodyguards at a Brazilian restaurant. Then, Sonia and Lyndah head to a yard sale to get a vehicle away from the car's owner and her out-of-control friend. And finally, the whole team hits the beach in an effort to get a truck-load of ATV's away from a gang of knife-wielding beach bums.

programme.title: Breakdowns and Beatdowns
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy head into a bad part of town to find that their target car is owned by bat-equipped gang bangers. Then, a seemingly friendly teacher and an assistant principal nearly come to blows when Froy and Sonia come around to repossess one of their vehicles Then, And finally, after the tow truck breaks down on the side of the road, Lou, Matt, and Froy are left with no options and stuck in the middle of a violent dispute between some gun-wielding neighbors.

programme.title: You Again?
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Lou get the shock a lifetime when they repossess a car from an irate doctor whom they know all too well from an earlier incident. This time he's twice as angry, and he's dead-set against giving up his car again. Then, Sonia, Matt, and Lyndah go undercover as college students to extract an extremely expensive bicycle from an extremely irate athlete. And finally, Lou and Froy head to church to repossess a van from a minister with a terrible problem.

programme.title: Scavenger Hunt
programme.desc: First, Lou and Froy transform their search for a small dirt bike into a quasi-reality show, getting a group of young smart-asses trapped into their own web. Then, Sonia and Matt head to the business district for a different sort of quarry - a high-end luxury tanning bed owned by a less-than-sympathetic German. And finally, Lou and Matt set up a high stakes sting operation to bust a shady tow-truck driver, but will their best-laid plans go up in smoke?

programme.title: The Dune Buggy
programme.desc: First, Lou and Froy tail an upper class debtor to an upscale restaurant where the food is almost as unpalatable as its clientele's attitude. Then, Lyndah and Froy head to a residential district to repossess a van that is busy being loaded up with stolen electronics by a dangerous pair of criminals. And finally, Matt and Froy head to the desert to sneak an extremely rare top-of-the-line dune buggy from a crew of dedicated off-roaders.

programme.title: High and Low Spirits
programme.desc: First, Lou and Sonia find themselves in the middle of a baffling marital spat involving a man, his wife, and her untrustworthy yoga instructor. Then, Sonia and Lyndah hit the fashion district to repossess a van from a designer who's way ahead of the curve in terms of the fashion world, but way behind on her payments. And finally, Matt and Froy spoil spirits when they head to a carwash to reclaim a vehicle from a group of vicious, scantily-clad sorority girls.

programme.title: Repo Outside the Box
programme.desc: First, Matt and Sonia attempt to repossess a car from a group of cleaver-wielding short-order cooks with a taste for violence. Then, it's trouble in paradise as Matt and Froy take on the task of reclaiming a beach-scene-on-wheels filled with irate models. And finally, Sonia and Matt find themselves outmatched by a well-armed street gang and its charismatic leader.

programme.title: Horse Semen & the Rolls Royce Golf Cart
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia head out to the farm to repossess a truck from an entitled equestrian who would rather die than let the repo team get their hands on what's in the back. Then, Lou and Sonia stumble into the middle of a prolonged business dispute between a flower lady and her displeased client. And finally, Sonia and Froy hit the links to reclaim a high-end Rolls Royce golf cart from a snob who thinks he's too good to pay his bills.

programme.title: Involuntary Voluntary
programme.desc: Lou and Matt inadvertently become pawns in an elaborate and misguided lesson perpetrated by a cheating husband upon his mistress. Then, Matt and Lou attempt to take a vehicle away from a debtor who is so drunk he doesn't remember agreeing to give his car away voluntarily. And, Froy and Sonia try to take a limousine away from its shotgun-wielding driver and his two suspiciously-dressed passengers.

programme.title: Froy's Bait and Lou's Cake
programme.desc: Lou and Froy set out some bait in a gated community to attract a security guard who's slow to make his payments, but quick to pull out his pepper spray. Then, Matt and Lou crash a wedding to repo a car from a truant DJ, but will they be able to get away unscathed when the party turns on them? And, Lou and Froy confront a gang of bikers in a back alley. Will the repo team's pleas for patience and calm be enough to overcome the angry bikers' bats and chains?

programme.title: Blow-Up and Cool Down
programme.desc: Lou and Lyndah reclaim a riding mower from a housewife and her grab-happy husband. Then, Sonia and Matt head out on a scorcher of an afternoon for a repossession. Will they be able to beat both the heat and a pair of geriatric debtors? And, Sonia and Lyndah are left without words when they see the dark and embarrassing secret held in the backseat of a debtor's unpaid vehicle.

programme.title: The Car That Rolled Away
programme.desc: Lou and Lyndah try to negotiate a set of keys away from a raucous group of drunken outdoorsmen. Then, Froy and Lyndah repo a vehicle from a unruly and untalented guitarist. Plus, Froy and Sonia bite off more than they can chew when they try to reclaim an SUV from a confused and embittered former football player.

programme.title: Naked and Dangerous
programme.desc: Sonia and Lyndah try to repossess a hot tub away from a group of upset partiers. Then, Lou and Matt try to negotiate with a pair of unintelligible and enraged parade participants. And, Lou and Lyndah must repo a car from a group of old men.

programme.title: Your Purpose, Unlocked
programme.desc: Be inspired to find the work you love to do with these TED Talks full of passion and zeal. 1) My quest to end the horror of gun violence in the US | Lucy McBath 2) How to find joy in climate action | Ayana Elizabeth Johnson 3) We should aim for perfection -- and stop fearing failure | Jon Bowers 4) You don't have to be an expert to solve big problems | Tapiwa Chiwewe 5) The crime-fighting power of cross-border investigative journalism | Bektour Iskender

programme.title: The Creative Zone
programme.desc: What makes us create and innovate? Here, wildly creative thinkers share ideas and insights into what kindles genius. 1) Why tech needs the humanities | Eric Berridge 2) The evolution of the book - Julie Dreyfuss 3) How storytelling helps parents in prison stay connected to their kids | Alan Crickmore 4) The power of diversity within yourself | Rebeca Hwang 5) How we can teach computers to make sense of our emotions | Raphael Arar

programme.title: The Future of Cities
programme.desc: Discover what's potentially in store for the world's urban hotspots. 1) How the water you flush becomes the water you drink | Francis de los Reyes 2) Cities are driving climate change. Here's how they can fix it | Angel Hsu 3) You don't have to leave your neighborhood to live in a better one | Majora Carter 4) The material that could change the world... for a third time | TED-Ed 5) How to transform sinking cities into landscapes that fight floods | Kotchakorn Voraakhom 6) How do self-driving cars "see"? | Sajan Saini

programme.title: Ocean Wonders
programme.desc: Dive into the unexplored world beneath the waves: the beautiful, fragile (and often mysterious) deeps of the ocean. 1) What's at the bottom of the ocean -- and how we're getting there | Victor Vescovo 2) The wild sex lives of marine creatures | Luka Seamus Wright 3) The discoveries awaiting us in the ocean's twilight zone | Heidi M. Sosik 4) Could you survive the real Twilight Zone? | Philip Renaud and Kenneth Kostel 5) The deep sea's medicinal secrets | Sam Afoullouss 6) The dangers of a noisy ocean -- and how we can quiet it down | Nicola Jones

programme.title: Revolutionary Women!
programme.desc: What happens when purpose and passion overshadow fear? Follow in the steps of these outstanding women who let their ferocity, fortitude and wisdom guide them in living -- and speaking -- their truth. 1) No. You cannot touch my hair! | Mena Fombo 2) How we can end sexual harassment at work | Gretchen Carlson 3) A bold plan to transform access to the US social safety net | Amanda Renteria 4) Why Black girls are targeted for punishment at school -- and how to change that | Monique W. Morris

programme.title: Secrets of the Wild
programme.desc: Be inspired to go out and rediscover the wonders of the natural world -- and get a deeper understanding of where (and why) the wild things grow. 1) Hidden miracles of the natural world | Louie Schwartzberg 2) These animals are also plants ... wait, what? | Luka Seamus Wright 3) The coolest animal you know nothing about ... and how we can save it | Patrícia Medici 4) The three different ways mammals give birth - Kate Slabosky 5) Moral behavior in animals | Frans de Waal 6) Why I love vultures | Munir Virani

programme.title: Good Talk
programme.desc: The art and science of meaningful conversation. 1) TikTok, Instagram, Snapchat -- and the rise of bite-sized content | Qiuqing Tai 2) How to train employees to have difficult conversations | Tamekia MizLadi Smith 3) Activism needs introverts | Sarah Corbett 4) The single most important parenting strategy | Becky Kennedy 5) What productive conflict can offer a workplace | Jess Kutch
